corrections.text: The article states Sony 'removed 12 titles from a developer called Testagamecreations'. The cited PlayStation LifeStyle report does not state the number 12; it enumerates a list of titles it could confirm were removed (and one entry separately notes a VR version). The figure 12 is a count of that list rather than a number reported by the source.

The article presents 'the submission process is no longer as permissive as it once was' as a direct quotation from an Afil Games representative. The cited LEVEL UP report renders this as reported/paraphrased speech ('a representative from Afil Games acknowledged the shift, noting that the submission process is no longer as permissive as it once was') rather than as a verbatim quotation.
